title: Haapsalu、Lääne County — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Haapsalu、Lääne Countyの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

HaapsaluはLääne Countyにある人口10,000の都市です。A picturesque coastal resort town on the Baltic Sea, known for its historic bishop’s castle, healing mud baths, charming wooden architecture, and the Kuursaal promenade.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
